1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class lookup values

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by the high risk class (attribute-only filter)

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality (by kommunenummer) with geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect quick-clay polygons

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) and include building id/number
